title: How to group contact phone numbers using zapier
excerpt: I have a main board that contains the status column to initiate the zap. When the status is changed, I want to use zapier to pull all of the values from a phone number column, loop the data, and then send an SMS text to …

posts.author: sgharibian (Sarkis Gharibian)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a main board that contains the status column to initiate the zap. When the status is changed, I want to use zapier to pull all of the values from a phone number column, loop the data, and then send an SMS text to multiple phone numbers.

The problem I am having is figuring out how to combine all of the phone numbers. I am trying to use the Get Column Values trigger but it forces me to select an Item ID. Not sure how to pull all the column values together.
